description_long: This sports car features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a low profile and a streamlined canopy-style cockpit. The exterior is predominantly a deep navy blue with contrasting white accents on the wheels, front, and rear sections. The vehicle has two large, rounded rear wheel housings that extend backward, giving it a futuristic and aggressive stance. The windows are tinted black, enhancing its sporty and high-performance appearance. The front end is sharply contoured with integrated headlights, while the rear is compact and slightly raised. The overall design suggests high speed and agility, suitable for urban environments and racing scenarios.
description: A futuristic navy blue sports car with white accents, a streamlined canopy, and large rear wheel housings, exuding speed and agility.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide, low nose with a black-tinted windshield and prominent wheel housings flanking the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated body, canopy cockpit, and the extended rear wheel housing with white detailing.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a compact, slightly raised back with white rear bumper and the symmetrical placement of the wheel housings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the streamlined profile, canopy, and distinctive rear wheel housing.
attribute_wheel_design: solid disc wheels with white accent covers
